results.title: How Amazfit’s AI Coaching and Bio Charge Score Optimize Your Rest Days
results.description: The fitness tracker landscape is becoming increasingly crowded, with brands like Fitbit, Garmin and Amazfit vying for attention through unique features and targeted designs. In a recent conversation from TechAvid, the focus turns to Amazfit’s latest offering, the Helio Strap 2, a screen-free wearable that prioritizes recovery and simplicity. Unlike many competitors, the Helio Strap [...] The post How Amazfit’s AI Coaching and Bio Charge Score Optimize Your Rest Days appeared first on Geeky Gadgets .

results.title: Madras High Court directs courts to conceal identities in matrimonial disputes involving mental illness
results.description: According to a Daily Thanthi report, the direction was issued by Justices Anand Venkatesh and Ramakrishnan while hearing a petition seeking review of an order passed by a Family Court in a divorce case between a husband and wife.

results.title: India's Defence Output Hits Record Rs 1.78 Lakh cr In FY26, Private Sector Share At All-Time High
results.description: Output has more than doubled since FY21 and quadrupled since FY14, as Indian companies emerge as credible suppliers of weapons and equipment to an expanding list of overseas buyers.

results.title: AI use in UK hits 'tipping point' as companies scale up, Google exec says
results.description: Britain is now at a crucial stage for artificial intelligence adoption. Companies are moving beyond just testing AI tools to using them for complex tasks and improving productivity. This shift is happening across various sectors, from retail to government. Experts believe AI can significantly boost productivity for businesses.

results.title: Telegram moves Delhi HC against temporary India ban ahead of NEET-UG re-exam
results.description: Authorities have argued that Telegram channels were allegedly being used to circulate leaked or fake question papers, coordinate cheating and spread exam-related misinformation.

results.title: Telegram moves Delhi HC against government ban ahead of NEET re-test, hearing today
results.description: Telegram has challenged the Central government's decision to block its services in India until June 22, citing the impact on over 150 million users amid NEET-UG exam-related concerns. The Delhi High Court has agreed to hear the urgent petition.

results.title: Man Arrested for Allegedly Strangling Live-In Partner in Bengaluru
results.description: A 27-year-old man has been taken into custody in Bengaluru for allegedly killing his live-in partner, a 20-year-old woman named Anusha. The incident reportedly occurred following a series of intense arguments that culminated in violence last week in the Malleswaram area. Sharath, the accused individual, and Anusha had been living together in a rented accommodation [...] The post Man Arrested for Allegedly Strangling Live-In Partner in Bengaluru appeared first on The CSR Journal .
